goal: Build context management engine: token budget, cache, conversation store, strategies, RAG pipeline

decisions.decision: 128k total token budget with dynamic allocation: system(2k), static(1k), RAG(4k), conversation(3k+500/10msgs), tool(5k), generation(4k)
decisions.rationale: Claude models have 200k windows but 128k is a safe operational ceiling. Dynamic conversation scaling prevents overflow without wasteful pre-allocation.

decisions.decision: Two-level cache (L1 in-memory LRU + L2 persistent) instead of single-level
decisions.rationale: L1 gives sub-ms lookups for hot data within a turn. L2 persists across turns so repeated queries don't re-fetch. Redis (L2 in production) not needed for local dev.

decisions.decision: 6 context strategies, with agent-to-strategy mapping in a lookup table
decisions.rationale: Different agents need different context shapes. Property-search needs RAG-first. Conversation-manager needs sliding window. One size does not fit all.

decisions.decision: RAG pipeline wraps results in XML tags with source attribution and relevance scores
decisions.rationale: XML creates clear source boundaries for grounding compliance. Source attribution enables the validator to check citations. Scores allow priority-based trimming.

log.detail: Read orchestration types and agent registry to understand agent config shapes and tool budgets
Claimed CTX-001 through CTX-007, reserved agentic-ai/src/context/**
Implemented TokenBudgetAllocator with dynamic conversation scaling, compaction at 85%
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — token allocation tests passing
Add token budget allocator with dynamic allocation and compaction at 85%
Implemented ContextCache with L1 LRU (5min TTL) and L2 persistent (1h TTL), access tracking, size stats
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — cache hit/miss, TTL eviction tests passing
Add multi-level context cache with L1 LRU and L2 persistent storage
Implemented ConversationStore with sliding window, summary of old messages, token counting
Implemented CoherenceManager: merges conversation/RAG/tools/entities, resolves conflicts by recency+trust
Implemented 6 context strategies with agent-to-strategy mapping: sliding, summary, entity, RAG-first, hierarchical, default
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — all context tests passing
Add conversation store, coherence manager, and 6 context strategies
Implemented RAGPipeline with hybrid retrieval, score filtering, source attribution, token counting, XML formatter
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — RAG pipeline tests passing (score filter, attribution, XML output)
Add RAG pipeline with hybrid retrieval, score filtering, and XML context formatter
Completed all 7 CTX beads. CTX-007 (XML formatter) was integrated into CTX-006 RAG pipeline.

summary: Built the complete context management engine. Completed 7 beads: CTX-001 (token budget), CTX-002 (multi-level cache), CTX-003 (conversation store), CTX-004 (coherence manager), CTX-005 (6 strategies), CTX-006 (RAG pipeline), CTX-007 (XML formatter). All verified. Unblocked CROSS-002 and TEST-002.
